backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining wellness report data types (SectionScores, MedicalHistory, UserAnswers, SolutionTip, CompleteWellnessReport) and storage with validation functions for answers and scores, plus helper functions for severity ranges and ID generation.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that converts old wellness report structure (simple scores/recommendations) to new structure with health profiles, medical history, user answers, and detailed solution tips with medical fitness flags.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting the Test Mode page feature with references to App.tsx, TestModePage.tsx, and testDataProcessor.ts files for displaying test profiles with analysis results.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of all frontend files including routing setup, component descriptions, hooks, data structures, and page implementations for the wellness assessment application.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS with Tailwind directives defining design tokens in OKLCH color space for light and dark themes, including sidebar, chart, and UI component color variables with --radius set to 0.625rem.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with meta tags for ABL Pulse holistic wellness assessment application, loading main.tsx module and mounting to #root div.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application component configuring TanStack Router with 11 routes (home, assessment, 4 sections, score summary, services, profile, results, test-mode, recommendations) wrapped in AssessmentProvider for global state management.
frontend/src/components/AboutSection.tsx: About section component displaying Root Cause Healing philosophy, four core value cards with icons and hover effects, and integrated FounderProfile component in a gradient background layout.
frontend/src/components/AnalysisCard.tsx: Reusable card component for displaying problems (red background) or suggestions (green background) with bilingual titles and conditional rendering of items as comma-separated text or bulleted list.
frontend/src/components/AssessmentPlaceh: Empty placeholder component file with no content.
frontend/src/components/AssessmentProgre: Progress bar component showing current section (1-4), percentage completion (25% increments), and animated gradient progress indicator with smooth transitions.
frontend/src/components/BasicInfoForm.ts: A comprehensive form component for collecting user basic information including personal details, physical measurements, contact info, and medical history. Validates inputs and saves data to local storage before navigating to the assessment.
frontend/src/components/CircularScoreGau: A circular progress gauge component that displays a score with gradient colors (red/amber/green) based on status category. Uses SVG to render an animated circular progress indicator.
frontend/src/components/ContactFooter.ts: Footer component displaying company branding, WhatsApp contact button, social media links (Facebook, Instagram, YouTube, LinkedIn), and copyright information with caffeine.ai attribution.
frontend/src/components/ErrorBoundary.ts: React error boundary class component that catches and displays errors with bilingual UI (English/Hindi). Provides options to retry or reload the page when errors occur.
frontend/src/components/FounderProfile.t: Displays founder Dr. Suman Lal's profile with image, credentials (40+ years experience), and mission statement in a styled card layout.
frontend/src/components/GlobalAssessment: Reusable component for assessment question options with bilingual labels (Never/Rarely/Sometimes/Often/Daily). Renders selectable buttons with visual feedback for the selected value.
frontend/src/components/HeroSection.tsx: Landing page hero section with animated background effects, main heading, and two CTA buttons for health assessment and booking a clarity session via WhatsApp.
frontend/src/components/LanguageSelectio: Empty file placeholder for language selection functionality.
frontend/src/components/LanguageToggleBu: Empty file placeholder for language toggle button component.
frontend/src/components/LoadingScreen.ts: Full-screen loading component with animated ABL logo, progress bar, and bilingual loading text (English/Hindi).
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Main navigation component with responsive design, logo, menu items (Home/Assessment/About/Contact), language toggle for assessment sections, and smooth scrolling functionality.
frontend/src/components/QuestionCard.tsx: Empty file placeholder for question card component.
frontend/src/components/QuestionCard40.t: Empty file placeholder for a specific question card variant.
frontend/src/components/ResultsPage.tsx: Empty file placeholder for assessment results display page.
frontend/src/components/ResumeProgressMo: Empty file placeholder for modal to resume incomplete assessments.
frontend/src/components/SectionContainer: Empty file placeholder for section wrapper/container component.
frontend/src/components/SectionScoreCard: Displays a section score card with bilingual title, score out of 40, status badge (alert/needsWork/optimal), icon, and a colored progress bar.
frontend/src/components/ServicesGrid.tsx: Renders a grid of four service cards (Health Score Card, Webinars, 1-on-1 Support, Structured Programs) with icons and descriptions.
frontend/src/config/constants.ts: Defines application-wide constants including WhatsApp number, message template, app metadata, and score thresholds for sections and total.
Provides assessment state management (responses, current section, language) with localStorage persistence and section completion/access logic.
frontend/src/data/questions/en.ts: Contains English questions for four sections (sleep/hydration, diet, exercise, stress) with 3 questions per section.
frontend/src/data/questions/hi.ts: Contains Hindi translations of the same questions as en.ts for four sections with 3 questions per section.
frontend/src/data/sections/section1.ts: Defines 10 bilingual questions (en/hi) for Section 1 covering daily routine, sleep, and wake-up habits.
frontend/src/data/sections/section2.ts: Defines 10 bilingual questions (en/hi) for Section 2 covering diet, digestion, and eating habits.
frontend/src/data/sections/section3.ts: Defines 10 bilingual questions (en/hi) for Section 3 covering physical activity, walking, breathing exercises, and energy levels.
frontend/src/data/sections/section4.ts: Defines 10 bilingual questions (en/hi) for Section 4 covering mental well-being, gratitude, family time, and emotional stability.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and manages an actor instance with Internet Identity authentication, invalidating dependent queries on actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useBasicInfoStorage.t: Custom hook for managing basic user information in localStorage, providing save, retrieve, clear, and validation functions for BasicInfoFormData.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login state, identity delegation, and auth client lifecycle with ICP integration.
frontend/src/hooks/usePDFDownload.ts: Custom hook that wraps PDF generation functionality for wellness reports, managing loading state and error handling with toast notifications.
frontend/src/index.css: Global styles with Tailwind configuration, OKLCH color system for brand colors, custom animations (pulse-glow, electric-wave-flow), and font definitions for Playfair Display and Montserrat.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React root with QueryClient and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers around the main App component.
frontend/src/pages/AssessmentPage.tsx: Page component displaying the BasicInfoForm with navigation back to home and ABL logo header.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Main landing page composing Navigation, HeroSection, ServicesGrid, AboutSection, and ContactFooter components.
frontend/src/pages/RecommendedServicesPa: Displays user info card with assessment scores and three static service recommendations (Health Webinars, 1-on-1 Coaching, Functional Readiness Program) based on wellness assessment results.
frontend/src/pages/ResultsPage.tsx: Assessment results page showing circular score gauge, section scores, analysis cards, and actions for PDF download and WhatsApp consultation booking.
frontend/src/pages/ScoreSummaryPage.tsx: Displays the assessment summary page with user info, total score, section-wise scores (Sleep, Gut, Movement, Nutrition), and action buttons to view detailed results or retake the assessment.
frontend/src/pages/Section1.tsx: Renders Section 1 (Sleep & Hydration) of the assessment with bilingual titles, 10 questions using GlobalAssessmentOptions, progress bar, and navigation to previous/next sections.
frontend/src/pages/Section1Placeholder.t: Empty placeholder file with no content.
frontend/src/pages/Section2.tsx: Renders Section 2 (Gut Cleanse & Metabolic) with access guards, bilingual content, questions, and navigation; redirects if Section 1 is incomplete.
frontend/src/pages/Section3.tsx: Renders Section 3 (Movement & Circulation Flow) with access guards ensuring previous sections are complete, bilingual titles/descriptions, questions, and navigation buttons.
frontend/src/pages/Section4.tsx: Renders Section 4 (Mind & Emotional Balance), the final assessment section, with access guards and a Complete button that navigates to score summary when all 40 questions are answered.
frontend/src/pages/TestModePage.tsx: Loads and displays three test profiles (Healthy, Moderate, Serious) from the backend with scores, medical history, circular gauges, section cards, and analysis tabs for testing purposes.
frontend/src/pages/WellnessProfilePage.t: Displays the user's wellness assessment results including total ABL score, section breakdowns with color-coded status indicators, and formatted user information with navigation back to home.
frontend/src/types/assessment.ts: Defines TypeScript interfaces for the assessment system including BasicInfoFormData (user demographics and medical history), Question, and Section structures.
frontend/src/utils/patternAnalysis.ts: Rule-based engine that analyzes low-scoring question patterns (0-3) to identify specific wellness problems and generate targeted Ayurvedic habit suggestions in both English and Hindi.
frontend/src/utils/pdfGenerator.ts: Generates a downloadable plain text wellness report containing user info, total ABL score, section breakdowns, identified problems, and habit suggestions formatted with ASCII borders.
frontend/src/utils/resultsSharingUtils.t: Empty utility file, likely intended for future results sharing functionality.
frontend/src/utils/scoringUtils.ts: Calculates section and total scores from assessment responses (40 questions across 4 sections), categorizes scores into alert/needsWork/optimal ranges, and provides color/label utilities for UI display.
frontend/src/utils/testDataProcessor.ts: Converts backend test data into frontend display format by generating realistic question-level responses from section totals, running pattern analysis, and adding medical-history-specific recommendations.
frontend/src/utils/whatsappIntegration.t: Opens WhatsApp with a pre-filled consultation request message containing the user's name and ABL score, directed to a default consultation number.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom color scheme using OKLCH color space, custom fonts (Playfair Display for headings, Montserrat for body), extended theme with brand colors, accordion animations, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state tracking for ABL Pulse Ayurvedic health assessment app with Motoko backend on Internet Computer, documenting architecture (rule-based pattern recognition, 40-question assessment, 0-160 scoring), existing test mode feature, and pending feature requests for internal test profiles with automatic score generation and backend verification functions.
